description: 6-factor cross-sectional stock scoring with inverse-volatility weighting. Top 25 stocks, monthly rebalance, always fully invested. Factors: momentum (skip-month), low volatility, quality persistence, short-term reversal, relative strength vs SPY, volatility compression.

how_it_works.scoring: 6-factor composite: momentum, low-vol, quality, reversal, relative strength, vol compression
how_it_works.selection: Top 25 stocks by composite score from universe of ~100 liquid large-caps
how_it_works.weighting: Inverse-volatility: lower-vol stocks get larger weights (natural hedge)
how_it_works.rebalance: Monthly on 1st trading day. Execute at next day's open.
how_it_works.costs: 5 bps slippage per trade. ~12 trades per month.

factors.name: Quality
factors.description: Fraction of 21-day windows with positive return
